revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 13 (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 13 (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月13日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[景行天皇]]27年（[[97年]]_月_日） - [[景行天皇]]が小碓皇子（後の[[日本武尊]]）に熊襲討伐を命じる * [[欽明天皇]]14年（[[552年]]_月_日） - [[仏教]]伝来。[[百済]]の聖明王から[[欽明天皇]]に釈迦如来像・経巻などが献上される（538年説あり） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]2年（[[1805年]]_月_日） - [[華岡青洲]]が日本初の[[麻酔]]を使った手術に成功 * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[明治天皇]]が[[江戸城]]に入る。名称を東京城と改めて皇居とする
== 誕生日 == * [[和銅]]2年（[[709年]]_月_日） - [[光仁天皇]]、49代[[天皇]]（+ [[781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘安]]5年（[[1282年]][[11月21日]]） - [[日蓮]]（立正大師）、[[日蓮宗]]の開祖（* [[1222年]]） * [[宝永]]4年（[[1707年]]_月_日） - [[服部嵐雪]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1654年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月12日 (旧暦)|10月12日]] 翌日[[10月14日 (旧暦)|10月14日]] - 前月[[9月13日 (旧暦)|9月13日]] 翌月[[11月13日 (旧暦)|11月13日]] *新暦[[10月13日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月12日 (旧暦)|10月12日]] 翌日[[10月14日 (旧暦)|10月14日]] - 前月[[9月13日 (旧暦)|9月13日]] 翌月[[11月13日 (旧暦)|11月13日]] *新暦[[10月13日]]

== できごと == * [[景行天皇]]27年（[[ユリウス暦]][[97年]][[11月5日]]） - [[景行天皇]]が小碓皇子（後の[[日本武尊]]）に熊襲討伐を命じる * [[欽明天皇]]14年（ユリウス暦[[552年]][[11月14日]]） - [[仏教]]伝来。[[百済]]の[[聖明王]]から[[欽明天皇]]に[[釈迦如来|釈迦如来像]]・経巻などが献上される（[[538年]]説あり） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1804年]]<!--[[12月3日]]-->） - [[華岡青洲]]が日本初の[[麻酔]]を使った手術に成功<ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=松木明知|year=1973年|title=華岡青洲による最初の全身麻酔の期日について|journal=日本医史学雑誌|volume=19|issue=2|pages=p.p.193-197|issn=0549-3323}}</ref><ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=天野陽介|year=2009年|title=日本の名医：55：503：華岡青洲|journal=活|volume=51|issue=5|pages=p.p.78-79}}</ref> * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月26日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[江戸城]]に入る。名称を東京城と改めて[[皇居]]とする
== 誕生日 == * [[和銅]]2年（ユリウス暦[[709年]][[11月18日]]） - [[光仁天皇]]、49代[[天皇]]（+ [[781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘安]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1282年]][[11月14日]]） - [[日蓮]]（立正大師）、[[日蓮宗]]開祖（* [[1222年]]）<ref>グレゴリオ暦に換算した[[11月21日]]に法要が営まれることも多い。</ref> * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月6日]]） - [[服部嵐雪]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1654年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== できごと == * [[景行天皇]]27年（[[ユリウス暦]][[97年]][[11月5日]]） - [[景行天皇]]が小碓皇子（後の[[日本武尊]]）に熊襲討伐を命じる <!-- 日本書紀には「10月」としか書かれていない * [[欽明天皇]]14年（ユリウス暦[[552年]][[11月14日]]） - [[仏教]]伝来。[[百済]]の[[聖明王]]から[[欽明天皇]]に[[釈迦如来|釈迦如来像]]・経巻などが献上される（[[538年]]説あり） --> * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（1623年12月4日） - {{仮リンク|江戸の大殉教|en|Great Martyrdom of Edo}} * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1804年]][[11月14日]]） - [[華岡青洲]]が日本初の[[麻酔]]を使った手術に成功<ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=松木明知|year=1973|title=華岡青洲による最初の全身麻酔の期日について|journal=日本医史学雑誌|volume=19|issue=2|pages=p.p.193-197|issn=0549-3323}}</ref><ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=天野陽介|year=2009|title=日本の名医：55：503：華岡青洲|journal=活|volume=51|issue=5|pages=p.p.78-79}}</ref> * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月26日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[江戸城]]に入る。名称を「東京城」と改めて[[皇居]]とする
== 誕生日 == * [[和銅]]2年（ユリウス暦[[709年]][[11月18日]]） - [[光仁天皇]]、49代[[天皇]]（+ [[781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘安]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1282年]][[11月14日]]） - [[日蓮]]（立正大師）、[[日蓮宗]]開祖（* [[1222年]]）<ref>グレゴリオ暦に換算した[[11月21日]]に法要が営まれることも多い。</ref> * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月6日]]） - [[服部嵐雪]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1654年]]）

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[October 13 (lunar calendar)]] to [[October 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]: Text replacement - "lunar calendar" to "Old Lunar Calendar"
revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月13日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[景行天皇]]27年（[[ユリウス暦]][[97年]][[11月5日]]） - [[景行天皇]]が小碓皇子（後の[[日本武尊]]）に熊襲討伐を命じる <!-- 日本書紀には「10月」としか書かれていない * [[欽明天皇]]14年（ユリウス暦[[552年]][[11月14日]]） - [[仏教]]伝来。[[百済]]の[[聖明王]]から[[欽明天皇]]に[[釈迦如来|釈迦如来像]]・経巻などが献上される（[[538年]]説あり） --> * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（1623年12月4日） - {{仮リンク|江戸の大殉教|en|Great Martyrdom of Edo}} * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1804年]][[11月14日]]） - [[華岡青洲]]が日本初の[[麻酔]]を使った手術に成功<ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=松木明知|year=1973|title=華岡青洲による最初の全身麻酔の期日について|journal=日本医史学雑誌|volume=19|issue=2|pages=p.p.193-197|issn=0549-3323}}</ref><ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=天野陽介|year=2009|title=日本の名医：55：503：華岡青洲|journal=活|volume=51|issue=5|pages=p.p.78-79}}</ref> * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月26日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[江戸城]]に入る。名称を「東京城」と改めて[[皇居]]とする
== 誕生日 == * [[和銅]]2年（ユリウス暦[[709年]][[11月18日]]） - [[光仁天皇]]、49代[[天皇]]（+ [[781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘安]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1282年]][[11月14日]]） - [[日蓮]]（立正大師）、[[日蓮宗]]開祖（* [[1222年]]）<ref>グレゴリオ暦に換算した[[11月21日]]に法要が営まれることも多い。</ref> * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月6日]]） - [[服部嵐雪]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1654年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|12|10|14|9|13|11|10|1013}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月13日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

{{Lunar October}} '''Lunar October13日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[景行天皇]]27年（[[ユリウス暦]][[97年]][[11月5日]]） - [[景行天皇]]が小碓皇子（後の[[日本武尊]]）に熊襲討伐を命じる <!-- 日本書紀には「10月」としか書かれていない * [[欽明天皇]]14年（ユリウス暦[[552年]][[11月14日]]） - [[仏教]]伝来。[[百済]]の[[聖明王]]から[[欽明天皇]]に[[釈迦如来|釈迦如来像]]・経巻などが献上される（[[538年]]説あり） --> * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（1623年12月4日） - {{仮リンク|江戸の大殉教|en|Great Martyrdom of Edo}} * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1804年]][[11月14日]]） - [[華岡青洲]]が日本初の[[麻酔]]を使った手術に成功<ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=松木明知|year=1973|title=華岡青洲による最初の全身麻酔の期日について|journal=日本医史学雑誌|volume=19|issue=2|pages=p.p.193-197|issn=0549-3323}}</ref><ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=天野陽介|year=2009|title=日本の名医：55：503：華岡青洲|journal=活|volume=51|issue=5|pages=p.p.78-79}}</ref> * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月26日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[江戸城]]に入る。名称を「東京城」と改めて[[皇居]]とする
== 誕生日 == * [[和銅]]2年（ユリウス暦[[709年]][[11月18日]]） - [[光仁天皇]]、49代[[天皇]]（+ [[781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘安]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1282年]][[11月14日]]） - [[日蓮]]（立正大師）、[[日蓮宗]]開祖（* [[1222年]]）<ref>グレゴリオ暦に換算した[[11月21日]]に法要が営まれることも多い。</ref> * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月6日]]） - [[服部嵐雪]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1654年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|12|10|14|9|13|11|10|1013}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十三]] [[zh:十月十三]] [[en:draft:October 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}}27年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|97|ja|97}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}}9年 (1623, December 4) – (【placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo】) * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|709|ja|709}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}, the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|ja|781}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛喜}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1231|ja|1231}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Tsuchimikado|ja|土御門天皇}}, the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|ja|1195}}). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1649|ja|1649}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}}, a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|ja|1599}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}}） – {{ill|Watanabe Kasansan|ja|渡辺崋山}}, a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|ja|1793}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

== Births == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|709|ja|709}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}, the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|ja|781}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛喜}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1231|ja|1231}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Tsuchimikado|ja|土御門天皇}}, the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|ja|1195}}). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1649|ja|1649}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}}, a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|ja|1599}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}}） – {{ill|Watanabe Kasansan|ja|渡辺崋山}}, a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|ja|1793}}).

[[sn:October 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十三]] [[zh:十月十三]] [[en:draft:October 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}}27年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|97|ja|97}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}}9年 (1623, December 4) – (【placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo】) * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|709|ja|709}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}, the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|ja|781}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛喜}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1231|ja|1231}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Tsuchimikado|ja|土御門天皇}}, the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|ja|1195}}). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1649|ja|1649}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}}, a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|ja|1599}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}}） – {{ill|Watanabe Kasansan|ja|渡辺崋山}}, a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|ja|1793}}).

[[sn:October 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十三]] [[zh:十月十三]] [[en:draft:October 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}}27年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|97|ja|97}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}}9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo}}) * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|709|ja|709}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}, the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|ja|781}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛喜}}3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1231|ja|1231}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Tsuchimikado|ja|土御門天皇}}, the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|ja|1195}}). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1649|ja|1649}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}}, a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|ja|1599}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}}） – {{ill|Watanabe Kasansan|ja|渡辺崋山}}, a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|ja|1793}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 27th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|97|ja|97}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo}} ) * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|709|ja|709}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} , the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|ja|781}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1231|ja|1231}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Tsuchimikado|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|ja|1195}} ). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1649|ja|1649}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|ja|1599}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ） – {{ill|Watanabe Kasansan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|ja|1793}} ).

[[sn:October 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十三]] [[zh:十月十三]] [[en:draft:October 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 27th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|97|ja|97}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo}} ) * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|709|ja|709}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} , the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|ja|781}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1231|ja|1231}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Tsuchimikado|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|ja|1195}} ). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1649|ja|1649}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|ja|1599}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ） – {{ill|Watanabe Kasansan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|ja|1793}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十三]] [[zh:十月十三]] [[en:draft:October 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 27th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|97|ja|97}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo}} ) * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|709|ja|709}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} , the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|ja|781}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1231|ja|1231}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Tsuchimikado|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|ja|1195}} ). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1649|ja|1649}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|ja|1599}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ） – {{ill|Watanabe Kasansan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|ja|1793}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十三]] [[zh:十月十三]] [[en:draft:October 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 27th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|97|ja|97}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo}} ) * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|709|ja|709}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} , the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|ja|781}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1231|ja|1231}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Tsuchimikado|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|ja|1195}} ). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1649|ja|1649}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|ja|1599}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ） – {{ill|Watanabe Kasansan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|ja|1793}} ). == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

[[sn:October 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十三]] [[zh:十月十三]] [[en:draft:October 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 27th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|97|ja|97}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo}} ) * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|709|ja|709}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} , the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|ja|781}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1231|ja|1231}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Tsuchimikado|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|ja|1195}} ). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1649|ja|1649}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|ja|1599}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ） – {{ill|Watanabe Kasansan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|ja|1793}} ).

[[sn:October 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十三]] [[zh:十月十三]] [[en:draft:October 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} 27th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|97|ja|97}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Keikō Tennō|ja|景行天皇}} ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo}} ) * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|709|ja|709}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} , the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|ja|781}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1231|ja|1231}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Tsuchimikado|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|ja|1195}} ). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1649|ja|1649}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|ja|1599}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ） – {{ill|Watanabe Kasansan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|ja|1793}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

== Births == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|709|ja|709}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} , the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|ja|781}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛喜}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1231|ja|1231}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Tsuchimikado|ja|土御門天皇}} , the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|ja|1195}} ). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1649|ja|1649}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|ja|近衛信尋}} , a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|ja|1599}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|November 23|ja|11月23日}} ） – {{ill|Watanabe Kasansan|ja|渡辺崋山}} , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|ja|1793}} ).
== See Also ==

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月13日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[景行天皇]]27年（[[ユリウス暦]][[97年]][[11月5日]]） - [[景行天皇]]が小碓皇子（後の[[日本武尊]]）に熊襲討伐を命じる <!-- 日本書紀には「10月」としか書かれていない * [[欽明天皇]]14年（ユリウス暦[[552年]][[11月14日]]） - [[仏教]]伝来。[[百済]]の[[聖明王]]から[[欽明天皇]]に[[釈迦如来|釈迦如来像]]・経巻などが献上される（[[538年]]説あり） --> * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（1623年12月4日） - {{仮リンク|江戸の大殉教|en|Great Martyrdom of Edo}} * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1804年]][[11月14日]]） - [[華岡青洲]]が日本初の[[麻酔]]を使った手術に成功<ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=松木明知|year=1973|title=華岡青洲による最初の全身麻酔の期日について|journal=日本医史学雑誌|volume=19|issue=2|pages=p.p.193-197|issn=0549-3323}}</ref><ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=天野陽介|year=2009|title=日本の名医：55：503：華岡青洲|journal=活|volume=51|issue=5|pages=p.p.78-79}}</ref> * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月26日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[江戸城]]に入る。名称を「東京城」と改めて[[皇居]]とする
== 誕生日 == * [[和銅]]2年（ユリウス暦[[709年]][[11月18日]]） - [[光仁天皇]]、49代[[天皇]]（+ [[781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘安]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1282年]][[11月14日]]） - [[日蓮]]（立正大師）、[[日蓮宗]]開祖（* [[1222年]]）<ref>グレゴリオ暦に換算した[[11月21日]]に法要が営まれることも多い。</ref> * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月6日]]） - [[服部嵐雪]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1654年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|12|10|14|9|13|11|10|1013}}

== できごと == * [[景行天皇]]27年（[[ユリウス暦]][[97年]][[11月5日]]） - [[景行天皇]]が小碓皇子（後の[[日本武尊]]）に熊襲討伐を命じる <!-- 日本書紀には「10月」としか書かれていない * [[欽明天皇]]14年（ユリウス暦[[552年]][[11月14日]]） - [[仏教]]伝来。[[百済]]の[[聖明王]]から[[欽明天皇]]に[[釈迦如来|釈迦如来像]]・経巻などが献上される（[[538年]]説あり） --> * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（1623年12月4日） - {{仮リンク|江戸の大殉教|en|Great Martyrdom of Edo}} * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1804年]][[11月14日]]） - [[華岡青洲]]が日本初の[[麻酔]]を使った手術に成功<ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=松木明知|year=1973|title=華岡青洲による最初の全身麻酔の期日について|journal=日本医史学雑誌|volume=19|issue=2|pages=p.p.193-197|issn=0549-3323}}</ref><ref>{{Cite journal|和書|author=天野陽介|year=2009|title=日本の名医：55：503：華岡青洲|journal=活|volume=51|issue=5|pages=p.p.78-79}}</ref> * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月26日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[江戸城]]に入る。名称を「東京城」と改めて[[皇居]]とする
== 誕生日 == * [[和銅]]2年（ユリウス暦[[709年]][[11月18日]]） - [[光仁天皇]]、49代[[天皇]]（+ [[781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘安]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1282年]][[11月14日]]） - [[日蓮]]（立正大師）、[[日蓮宗]]開祖（* [[1222年]]）<ref>グレゴリオ暦に換算した[[11月21日]]に法要が営まれることも多い。</ref> * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[11月6日]]） - [[服部嵐雪]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1654年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}}

{{Lunisolar October|qq=}} 
'''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}  day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 27th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:97|97]]  [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]]  ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲).
* [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo|qq=}} )
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1804|1804]]  [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]]  achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref>
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1868|1868]]  [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births ==
* [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:709|709]]  [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Kōnin]] , the 49th emperor († [[:en:781|781]] ).

== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Kangi|Kankō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1231|1231]]  [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Tsuchimikado|Tsuchimikado]] , the 83rd emperor (* [[:en:1195|1195]] ).
* [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1649|1649]]  [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhiro]] , a court noble and regent (* [[:en:1599|1599]] ).
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1841|1841]]  [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasansan]] , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* [[:en:1793|1793]] ).

== See Also ==

{{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}}
{{Lunisolar October|qq=}} 
'''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}  day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 27th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:97|97]]  [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]]  ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲).
* [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo|qq=}} )
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1804|1804]]  [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]]  achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref>
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1868|1868]]  [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births ==
* [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:709|709]]  [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Kōnin]] , the 49th emperor († [[:en:781|781]] ).

== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Kangi|Kankō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1231|1231]]  [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Tsuchimikado|Tsuchimikado]] , the 83rd emperor (* [[:en:1195|1195]] ).
* [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1649|1649]]  [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhiro]] , a court noble and regent (* [[:en:1599|1599]] ).
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1841|1841]]  [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasansan]] , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* [[:en:1793|1793]] ).

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}}

{{Expand Chinese|1=十月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}}
{{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}}
{{Lunisolar October|qq=}} 
'''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}  day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 27th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:97|97]]  [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]]  ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲).
* [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo|qq=}} )
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1804|1804]]  [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]]  achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref>
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1868|1868]]  [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births ==
* [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:709|709]]  [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Kōnin]] , the 49th emperor († [[:en:781|781]] ).

== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Kangi|Kankō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1231|1231]]  [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Tsuchimikado|Tsuchimikado]] , the 83rd emperor (* [[:en:1195|1195]] ).
* [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1649|1649]]  [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhiro]] , a court noble and regent (* [[:en:1599|1599]] ).
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1841|1841]]  [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasansan]] , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* [[:en:1793|1793]] ).

'''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}  day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 27th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:97|97]]  [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]]  ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲).
* [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo|qq=}} )
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1804|1804]]  [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]]  achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref>
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1868|1868]]  [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births ==
* [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:709|709]]  [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Kōnin]] , the 49th emperor († [[:en:781|781]] ).

== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Kangi|Kankō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1231|1231]]  [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Tsuchimikado|Tsuchimikado]] , the 83rd emperor (* [[:en:1195|1195]] ).
* [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1649|1649]]  [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhiro]] , a court noble and regent (* [[:en:1599|1599]] ).
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1841|1841]]  [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasansan]] , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* [[:en:1793|1793]] ).

{{Lunisolar October|qq=}} 
'''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}  day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 27th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:97|97]]  [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]]  ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲).
* [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo|qq=}} )
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1804|1804]]  [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]]  achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref>
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1868|1868]]  [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births ==
* [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:709|709]]  [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Kōnin]] , the 49th emperor († [[:en:781|781]] ).

== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Kangi|Kankō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1231|1231]]  [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Tsuchimikado|Tsuchimikado]] , the 83rd emperor (* [[:en:1195|1195]] ).
* [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1649|1649]]  [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhiro]] , a court noble and regent (* [[:en:1599|1599]] ).
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1841|1841]]  [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasansan]] , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* [[:en:1793|1793]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} . == Events == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 27th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:97|97]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo|qq=}} ) * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace. == Births == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:709|709]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Kōnin]] , the 49th emperor († [[:en:781|781]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kangi|Kankō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1231|1231]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Tsuchimikado|Tsuchimikado]] , the 83rd emperor (* [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1649|1649]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhiro]] , a court noble and regent (* [[:en:1599|1599]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasansan]] , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* [[:en:1793|1793]] ).

'''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}  day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 27th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:97|97]]  [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]]  ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲).
* [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo|qq=}} )
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1804|1804]]  [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]]  achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref>
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1868|1868]]  [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births ==
* [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:709|709]]  [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Kōnin]] , the 49th emperor († [[:en:781|781]] ).

== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Kangi|Kankō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1231|1231]]  [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Tsuchimikado|Tsuchimikado]] , the 83rd emperor (* [[:en:1195|1195]] ).
* [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1649|1649]]  [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhiro]] , a court noble and regent (* [[:en:1599|1599]] ).
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1841|1841]]  [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasansan]] , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* [[:en:1793|1793]] ).

'''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}  day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 27th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:97|97]]  [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]]  ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲).
* [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo|qq=}} )
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1804|1804]]  [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]]  achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref>
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1868|1868]]  [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace.
== Births ==
* [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:709|709]]  [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Kōnin]] , the 49th emperor († [[:en:781|781]] ).

== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Kangi|Kankō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1231|1231]]  [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Tsuchimikado|Tsuchimikado]] , the 83rd emperor (* [[:en:1195|1195]] ).
* [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1649|1649]]  [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhiro]] , a court noble and regent (* [[:en:1599|1599]] ).
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1841|1841]]  [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasansan]] , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* [[:en:1793|1793]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} . == Events == * [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] 27th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:97|97]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Keikō|Keikō Tennō]] ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo|qq=}} ) * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace. == Births == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:709|709]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Kōnin]] , the 49th emperor († [[:en:781|781]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kangi|Kankō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1231|1231]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Tsuchimikado|Tsuchimikado]] , the 83rd emperor (* [[:en:1195|1195]] ). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1649|1649]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – [[:en:Konoe Nobuhiro|Konoe Nobuhiro]] , a court noble and regent (* [[:en:1599|1599]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:November 23|November 23]] ） – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasansan]] , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* [[:en:1793|1793]] ).
== See Also ==

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} . == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Keikō Tennō}} 27th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|97|en|97|WD=Q1166421|lt=97}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5}} ） – {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Keikō Tennō}} ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genwa (Japan)}} 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo|qq=}} ) * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (era)}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1804|en|1804|WD=Q6894|lt=1804}} {{ill|November 14|en|November 14|WD=Q2983|lt=November 14}} ） – {{ill|Hanaoka Seishū|en|Hanaoka Seishū|WD=Q1376935|lt=Kawaoka Seishū}} achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}} ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace. == Births == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|709|en|709|WD=Q23514|lt=709}} {{ill|November 18|en|November 18|WD=Q3027|lt=November 18}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|WD=Q958662|lt=Kōnin}} , the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|en|781|WD=Q31175|lt=781}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kangi|en|Kangi|WD=Q1194200|lt=Kankō}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1231|en|1231|WD=Q5417|lt=1231}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Tsuchimikado|en|Emperor Tsuchimikado|WD=Q357269|lt=Tsuchimikado}} , the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|en|1195|WD=Q19745|lt=1195}} ). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1649|en|1649|WD=Q6945|lt=1649}} {{ill|November 15|en|November 15|WD=Q2982|lt=November 15}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|en|Konoe Nobuhiro|WD=Q923621|lt=Konoe Nobuhiro}} , a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841}} {{ill|November 23|en|November 23|WD=Q3021|lt=November 23}} ） – {{ill|Watanabe Kazan|en|Watanabe Kazan|WD=Q3130609|lt=Watanabe Kasansan}} , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|en|1793|WD=Q7807|lt=1793}} ).

{{Not to be confused with|October 13|qq=October 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} . == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Keikō Tennō|1=Emperor Keikō}} 27th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|97|en|97|WD=Q1166421|lt=97|1=97}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5|1=November 5}} ） – {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Keikō Tennō|1=Emperor Keikō}} ordered the young prince (later known as {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}} ) to subdue the Kumano (熊襲). * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genwa (Japan)|1=Yuanhe}} 9th year (1623, December 4) – ({{placeholder: Great Martyrdom of Edo|qq=}} ) * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (era)|1=Bunka}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1804|en|1804|WD=Q6894|lt=1804|1=1804}} {{ill|November 14|en|November 14|WD=Q2983|lt=November 14|1=November 14}} ） – {{ill|Hanaoka Seishū|en|Hanaoka Seishū|WD=Q1376935|lt=Kawaoka Seishū|1=Hanaoka Seishū}} achieved Japan’s first successful surgery using anesthesia.<ref>…</ref> * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26|1=November 26}} ） – The Meiji Emperor entered Edo Castle, renaming it “Tokyo Castle” and establishing the Imperial Palace. == Births == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|709|en|709|WD=Q23514|lt=709|1=709}} {{ill|November 18|en|November 18|WD=Q3027|lt=November 18|1=November 18}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|WD=Q958662|lt=Kōnin|1=Emperor Kōnin}} , the 49th emperor († {{ill|781|en|781|WD=Q31175|lt=781|1=781}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kangi|en|Kangi|WD=Q1194200|lt=Kankō|1=Kangi}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1231|en|1231|WD=Q5417|lt=1231|1=1231}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6|1=November 6}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Tsuchimikado|en|Emperor Tsuchimikado|WD=Q357269|lt=Tsuchimikado|1=Emperor Tsuchimikado}} , the 83rd emperor (* {{ill|1195|en|1195|WD=Q19745|lt=1195|1=1195}} ). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1649|en|1649|WD=Q6945|lt=1649|1=1649}} {{ill|November 15|en|November 15|WD=Q2982|lt=November 15|1=November 15}} ） – {{ill|Konoe Nobuhiro|en|Konoe Nobuhiro|WD=Q923621|lt=Konoe Nobuhiro|1=Konoe Nobuhiro}} , a court noble and regent (* {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599|1=1599}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}} {{ill|November 23|en|November 23|WD=Q3021|lt=November 23|1=November 23}} ） – {{ill|Watanabe Kazan|en|Watanabe Kazan|WD=Q3130609|lt=Watanabe Kasansan|1=Watanabe Kazan}} , a Dutch studies scholar and painter (* {{ill|1793|en|1793|WD=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}} ).
